examples: I admire her coolness under pressure.
Such coolness under pressure is the mark of a champion.
Blue is associated with the positive qualities of trust, efficiency, quietness, coolness, reflection and calm.
Attendants are instructed on how to keep a sense of comfort, coolness, and ambiance in effect.
A. hunger-striker (also played by Fassbender), was imperilled by the coolness of its own gaze.
